creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
http://www.ircd-ratbox.org/ has been cybersquatted, so the URLs in the port are out of date.

Fix: ratbox-services-1.2.3.tbz has been removed from ratbox.org, so it could perhaps do with an update at some point, but for the moment it fetches from koitsu's site and fixes the bigger issue.
